customer_anxiety_profile: No anxiety signals present. Brian is warm, casual, and cooperative. His screening system suggests he is selective about calls he takes, which makes his willingness to re-book a positive signal — but the closer should not mistake warmth for commitment, given the prior appointment was already missed or rescheduled.
unresolved_concerns: No bill data captured or confirmed — closer has no financial anchor for this customer
No verify items completed on this call — qualification state is based entirely on prior (stale) records
Reason the prior appointment was missed or rescheduled is unknown — closer should probe gently
exact_promises_rep_made: Wednesday at 6:00 PM appointment confirmed (the twenty ninth at 06:00)
Specialist will 'go over solar programs and show you how much you could be saving with solar energy'
closer_should_know: This is a re-booking on a warm customer who cleared a screening system to take the call — genuine positive signal. However, the setter did zero qualification work: no bill, no verify, no decision-maker check, no button-up protocol. The closer is walking in blind. Pull the prior record before the call, confirm bill data is current, and open with a light re-qualification question rather than assuming the prior context still holds. The warmth is real; the foundation under it is thin.
